m1-docker.notes: Not needed - Instatic runs NATIVELY via Bun (no Docker / WSL2). This is the unlock.

s9-instatic.notes: PROVEN LIVE - a native Instatic instance put all 33 tables into the tenant schema, 0 in public.

s2-firstrun.notes: Resolved - tenant self-onboards via Instatic's native setup wizard (share link). No headless owner needed.

s4-gateway.notes: DONE 2026-07-01 - managed AI mode wired end-to-end. TenantRuntime passes the tenant's signed gateway URL + operator model as env (INSTATIC_AI_GATEWAY_URL / INSTATIC_AI_MODEL). Instatic's OpenRouter driver honours the credential baseUrl; a synthetic 'managed' credential + fixed model are surfaced so the AI Assistant works with zero tenant config; every provider/default/test WRITE returns 403 so tenants can't BYO-key or change the model. Real key stays in the gateway only.

s1-assets.notes: Blocked: Docker won't install on this machine (no admin / WSL2). Deferred to a Docker-capable machine.

sA-anim.notes: Blocked: Docker won't install on this machine (no admin / WSL2). Deferred to a Docker-capable machine.

s9-db.notes: Done - proven on real Postgres 18 (2026-06-30): isolation, doors locked, idempotent provision, clean teardown.

s3-upload.notes: Pending - testable WITHOUT Docker (wrangler + free Cloudflare account + a static test folder). The one remaining no-Docker spike.

m1-postgres.notes: Done - siteagent_platform DB + siteagent_admin role created locally (2026-06-30).

m1-registry.notes: Built + migrated: siteagent_control (settings/tenants/deploys) + pg access + AES-256-GCM encrypted secrets.

m1-compose.notes: Not needed - no Docker/compose; TenantRuntime spawns native Bun processes with per-tenant env.

m2-schema-role.notes: Done - idempotent mint SQL proven (CREATE ROLE guard + CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS + ALTER ROLE search_path).

m2-firstrun.notes: Instance boots + serves the setup wizard; tenant creates their own owner. Verified.

m2-cf.notes: CF Pages project created lazily on first deploy (namespaced siteagent-slug).

m2-saga.notes: Provisioner saga + Registry state machine (db_ready, up, seeded, done) + cleanup on failure. Verified end-to-end via API.

m2-deprovision.notes: Stops the process, removes the schema + role, clears the tenant folder. Built.

m3-proxy.notes: AI Gateway built: forwards to OpenRouter, injects the global key, SSE streaming. Key never in a tenant instance.

m3-token.notes: Signed per-tenant HMAC token, validated at the gateway (a leaked URL cannot be replayed).

m3-rate.notes: Pending - per-tenant rate guard; gated by m3-proxy.

m3-meter.notes: Pending - usage metering to Registry; gated by m3-proxy + m1-registry.

m4-watch.notes: Tenant Publish triggers the CF deploy directly via a token-authed webhook (INSTATIC_DEPLOY_WEBHOOK -> POST /deploy/<token>) fired from Instatic's publish handler on explicit Publish only (not autosave). No fs.watch needed - the Publish action IS the completion signal. Deploy runs in the background; result lands in the deploys registry.

m4-deploy.notes: wrangler Direct Upload wired (project + deploy + capture pages.dev URL). Needs CF creds in Settings to run.

m4-record.notes: Deploys saved in the registry with live URL + status.

m4-domains.notes: Pending - custom domains (CF API + DNS); gated by m4-deploy.

m5-settings.notes: Astro SSR Settings page: OpenRouter key/model + Cloudflare creds (encrypted at rest, masked).

m5-tenants.notes: Astro SSR Tenants page: add / start / publish / remove; shows status, instance link, live URL. On :3000.

m5-dash.notes: Pending - usage/health dashboards; gated by m7-metrics.

m5-alerts.notes: Pending - failure alerts; gated by m1-registry.

m6-roles.notes: Pending - Tenant Admin + custom toggle roles; gated by m2-firstrun.

m6-audit.notes: Pending - per-user audit log; gated by m2-firstrun.

m7-metrics.notes: Pending - metrics collector + time series; gated by m1-registry.

m8-upgrade.notes: Pending - fleet upgrade (sequential rolling restart); gated by m2-saga.

m8-backup.notes: Pending - backup/restore (pg_dump -n + uploads); gated by m2-saga.

m9-vps.notes: Pending - production VPS (Linode) + Docker; gated by m5-tenants.

m9-proxy.notes: Pending - Caddy/Traefik editing-domain TLS; gated by m9-vps.

m9-secrets.notes: Pending - secrets manager (replace plaintext-on-host); gated by m5-settings.

m9-pool.notes: Pending - PgBouncer before ~5-8 tenants; gated by m1-postgres.

if-media.notes: Minified @media( (no space, from Vite/Astro) was silently dropped by happy-dom, losing all responsive CSS. Normalized before parse (2026-07-01).

if-cascade.notes: Custom media conditions now emit mobile-first (min-width ascending / max-width descending) so the correct breakpoint wins on wide screens.

if-lineheight.notes: Publisher reset now line-height:normal (was 1.5) - buttons/cards inherited 1.5 and rendered +3px taller than the source.

if-sticky.notes: Reset now body{min-height} (was height:100%), which confined position:sticky to one screen; navbar now sticks the whole page.

if-iconbtn.notes: Buttons keep <svg>/element children; base.button renders children like base.link. Hamburger/icon buttons no longer import empty.

if-dedup.notes: generateClassCSS refuses to emit two byte-identical rules - fixes active-nav colour override + halves CSS size.

if-portdrift.notes: createTenant ON CONFLICT now resets all fields incl. port - registry no longer drifts from the running instance on re-create.

if-crashguard.notes: tenantRuntime child 'error' handler + control-plane uncaught/unhandled guards - a tenant boot failure returns a clean 400 instead of crashing the whole control-plane.
